name: extension parses issue body text for security-pattern markers like CWE or CVE references
command: mkdir -p fixtures && printf '{"number":42,"title":"CVE-2025-001 vuln","body":"Affects CWE-89 SQL injection","labels":["security"]}\n' > fixtures/issues.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/issue-tracker.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --upstream-stub fixtures/issues.jsonl --emit patterns --out patterns.jsonl 2>err.txt && grep -q '"cve":"CVE-2025-001"' patterns.jsonl && grep -q '"cwe":"CWE-89"' patterns.jsonl && echo ok 1>&2
